findings.title: Share awarded without open competition
findings.detail: 36% of contract value ($42.4b) was awarded via limited (non-competitive) tender rather than open tender.

findings.title: Supplier concentration
findings.detail: The 10 largest suppliers captured 33% of all contract value. The single largest, AUSTAL DEFENCE SHIPBUILDING AUSTRALIA, won $7.43b across 5 contracts.

findings.title: Director of National Parks: heavy reliance on limited tender
findings.detail: 82% of this agency's $0.11b was awarded via limited tender.

findings.title: Digital Transformation Agency: heavy reliance on limited tender
findings.detail: 82% of this agency's $0.18b was awarded via limited tender.

findings.title: Australian Centre for Disease Control: heavy reliance on limited tender
findings.detail: 79% of this agency's $0.13b was awarded via limited tender.

findings.title: Largest single contract
findings.detail: $5.23b — Department of Defence to AUSTAL DEFENCE SHIPBUILDING AUSTRALIA for Landing Craft Heavy.
